label: VIA Rail Lake Superior Baggage Car Alerts

comments.text: The Fitzgerald enters a squall while still on Lake Superior; the squall obscures the vessel from radar observation by the Anderson; this is normal when in a squall.

VIA_RAIL Lake Superior (185) SUDB->WHTR [2026-02-28] Alert: The baggage car will be removed from this train. We will be unable to transport any oversized items, but there will be no impact to the amount of non-oversized suitcases that passengers are allowed to bring.
